flow.name: Support triage
flow.description: When a customer asks for support, ask whether the issue is billing, account access, or something else. Send billing questions to finance, account access issues to support, and route other issues to a human agent.

config.question: Is this about billing, account access, or something else?

nodes.name: Route other issue to human support

metadata.source_prompt: When a customer asks for support, ask whether the issue is billing, account access, or something else. Send billing questions to finance, account access issues to support, and route other issues to a human agent.
assumptions: Template selected because the prompt mentions support triage.
Billing is routed to finance and account access is routed to support.
Other or unexpected issues are routed to a human support team.

explanation.summary: The workflow starts when support message occurs. It asks: "Is this about billing, account access, or something else?" It can route work to the finance, support, and human support team. It can complete with billing routed to finance, account access routed to support, and other issue routed to human support.
explanation.trigger_description: The workflow starts when support message occurs.

steps.title: Trigger: Support message
steps.description: The workflow starts when support message occurs.

steps.title: Ask question: Ask issue type
steps.description: The bot asks "Is this about billing, account access, or something else?" and stores the answer in `issue_type`. Expected answers are billing, account access, and something else.

steps.title: Condition: Route issue type
steps.description: The workflow evaluates `issue_type` and branches: if `issue_type == 'billing'` it goes to route-billing; if `issue_type == 'account access'` it goes to route-account-access; otherwise it follows the fallback to route-human-support.
next_steps: If issue_type == 'billing', continue to Route billing to finance.
If issue_type == 'account access', continue to Route account access to support.
Otherwise, continue to Route other issue to human support.

steps.title: Assign to team: Route billing to finance
steps.description: The workflow assigns the conversation to the finance team.

steps.title: Assign to team: Route account access to support
steps.description: The workflow assigns the conversation to the support team.

steps.title: Assign to team: Route other issue to human support
steps.description: The workflow assigns the conversation to the human support team.

steps.title: End: Billing routed
steps.description: The workflow completes with outcome: billing routed to finance.

steps.title: End: Account access routed
steps.description: The workflow completes with outcome: account access routed to support.

steps.title: End: Human support routed
steps.description: The workflow completes with outcome: other issue routed to human support.

outcomes: other issue routed to human support
assumptions: Template selected because the prompt mentions support triage.
Billing is routed to finance and account access is routed to support.
Other or unexpected issues are routed to a human support team.
notes: Conditions support only a constrained syntax during simulation.
